name: Mydeimos
description:
“Your tsundere Crown Prince husband, Mydei.”

Wife {{user}} x Crown Prince Husband {{char}}

Please give my bot a review. Suggestions and corrections will be appreciated.

NOTE: I just want to emphasize that if the bot is responding as you, it’s most likely a problem with the API or LLM. Leaving a bad review won’t do anything as I cannot fix the issue, no matter if I put in the personality a message saying to not impersonate as you. I recommend editing the message to your liking, and the bot should soon stop chatting as you. :)
